title: Amidst waving of party flags, an offbeat representation of the Flag above all flags
summary: Against the backdrop of intense poll activity, a 400-metre stretch of an arterial road in the outskirts of Chennai (technically in Madurapakkam panchayat under Tambaram assembly constituency) presents a salute to the idea of res publica, which underpins India’s system of governance, where citizens have a say, at least before a government is securely ensconced in the seat of power.  A Republic Day initiative shines bright every night

title: Transnational terror case: J&K Police's Counter Intelligence Wing carries out raids in three districts
summary: Raids by Counter Intelligence Wing of Jammu and Kashmir Police target key locations linked to a terror network orchestrated by Lashkar-e-Taiba operatives

title: Markapuram bus fire: Telangana sets up control rooms as victims traced to families in Andhra
summary: The incident was reported on March 26 in Markapuram district, when a lorry rammed into a private passenger bus, triggering a massive blaze that rapidly engulfed both vehicles

title: Assembly Elections LIVE updates: BJP fields R.G. Kar victim’s mother from Panihati
summary: AIADMK general secretary Edappadi K. Palaniswami (EPS) yesterday released the list of constituencies allotted to the constituents of the AIADMK-led National Democratic Alliance (NDA) in Tamil Nadu

title: Bus-truck collision in Markapuram LIVE: 13 killed, 25 injured; Chandrababu Naidu expresses shock
summary: Chief Minister Nara Chandrababu Naidu expressed shock and deep sorrow over the burning of several passengers in the bus accident

title: LPG crisis: Cooking gas crunch revives firewood economy in rural and semi-urban Karnataka
summary: The surge in demand, triggered by supply constraints linked to the ongoing West Asia crisis, has given rise to a parallel, largely informal firewood market in many districts

title: India among five nations granted passage through Strait of Hormuz by Tehran
summary: Global oil and gas prices have surged after Iran virtually blocked the Strait of Hormuz, a narrow shipping lane between the Persian Gulf and the Gulf of Oman, that handles roughly 20% of global oil and LNG

title: Fuel outlets in Hyderabad packed on third consecutive day, no relief for LPG auto drivers on March 26 too
summary: Telangana Civil Supplies Minister N. Uttam Kumar Reddy’s assurance that petroleum products are more than adequate for the next three months seems not to have convinced people
